posts.author: ahspectra2231 (Ahmad ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone

I really enjoy using monday.com — it’s an incredibly flexible and powerful platform.

I wanted to share a small improvement idea that could save a lot of time for many users:

Feature Request:

It would be very helpful to have an option to copy views from one board to another, similar to how we can already copy items or automations.

Right now, when a custom view is created (filters, sorting, grouping, etc.), it needs to be rebuilt manually for every board that requires the same structure.

A “Copy View to Another Board” feature would make workflows faster and more consistent across teams.

Thanks to the monday.com team for always listening to users and improving the product

-–

By the way, I also work with SaaS companies on UX-focused copy and product communication.

If the team ever needs user-perspective insights or clarity suggestions, I’d be happy to help.
